methodology_notes: Annual Foundry/IDG Security Priorities study of security-focused IT leaders and decision-makers across regions. Aggregate figures cited. Used here as both a distributional reference and a source of paired on-task calibration questions (see calibration-map SEED_POINTS).

distributions.context: 48% rank strengthening data protection as a top security priority for the year
73% are more likely than before to consider AI-enabled security solutions
76% say it is getting harder to choose the right security tools amid a crowded vendor market
61% expect their security budget to increase over the next 12 months
